title: Pipedream
author: Pipedream
copyText:
## Editorial notes

Pipedream is useful when agent workflows need event triggers, API glue, and custom code steps without building a full backend.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# Pipedream

Workflow automation platform for connecting APIs, building event-driven automations, and integrating developer tools.
